blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 9.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 69".
